aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and missing schema markups, but improvements can significantly boost visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content to address common HVAC queries.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized but can benefit from more posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and emergency services.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and FAQPage schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by creating detailed content on regional climate challenges and solutions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ content and essential schema markups, causing AI models to overlook their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend their services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share; act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Business with AI-Ready Strategies
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services more visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
